enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and Provisioning) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: immediate effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall apply to following Non-Banking Finance
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as a
'NBFC').
enriched_requirements.object: Finance Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as a 'NBFC')

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to Housing Finance Company
registered with the RBI under NHB Act, 1987;
enriched_requirements.object: Company registered with the RBI under NHB Act, 1987

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Housing Finance Company) Directions, 2025 shall prevail in the event of
conflict, if any, with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of conflict

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to NBFC-Micro Finance Institution
registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934;
enriched_requirements.object: Institution registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Microfinance Institution) Directions, 2025 shall prevail in the event
of conflict, if any, with these Directions, with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of conflict

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to Mortgage Guarantee Company
registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934;
enriched_requirements.object: Company registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions contained in the
Reserve Bank of India (Mortgage Guarantee Companies) Directions, 2025 shall
prevail in the event of conflict, if any, with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of conflict

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these directions shall apply to Core Investment Company
registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934;
enriched_requirements.object: Company registered with the RBI under RBI Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of
India (Core Investment Companies) Directions, 2025 shall prevail in the event of
conflict, if any, with these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of conflict

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC which is required to comply with Indian Accounting Standards (Ind AS)
shall continue to be guided by the Standards and the advisories issued by the
<image>
Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI Advisories) in case of any
inconsistencies between these Directions and the Standards.
enriched_requirements.object: by the Standards and the advisories issued by the <image> Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI Advisories) in case

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall also follow the prudential guidelines on income recognition, asset
classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as
prescribed in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, in addition to these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: guidelines on income recognition, asset classification and provisioning of advances for restructured accounts as prescribed

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In these Directions, unless the context states otherwise, the terms herein shall
bear the meaning assigned to them below:
(1) 'loss asset' shall mean either of the following:
1 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Amendment Directions, 2026 dated April 29, 2026.
enriched_requirements.object: to them below: (1) 'loss asset' shall mean either of the following: 1 Substituted with effect from July 01, 2026 vide Reserv

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) 'overdue' status - any amount due to a NBFC under any credit facility
shall be treated as 'overdue' if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the
NBFC.
enriched_requirements.object: if it is not paid on the due date fixed by the NBFC

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) 'standard asset' shall mean the asset in respect of which, no default in
repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which
does not disclose any problem or carry more than normal risk attached
to the business.
enriched_requirements.object: respect of which, no default in repayment of principal or payment of interest is perceived and which does not disclose any problem o

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) 'wilful defaulter' shall mean the same as defined under the Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Treatment of Wilful
Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: defined under the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Treatment of Wilful Defaulters and Large Defaulters) Direc

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The definitions of the terms 'Micro Enterprises', 'Small Enterprises', and 'Medium
Enterprises' shall be in terms of the circular FIDD.MSME &
NFS.BC.No.3/06.02.31/2020-21 dated July 2, 2020 on 'Credit flow to Micro,
Small and Medium Enterprises Sector' as updated from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the circular FIDD

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The terms 'Commercial Real Estate (CRE)', 'Commercial Real Estate -
Residential Housing Sector (CRE - RH)', 'project finance', and 'financial closure'
shall have the same meaning assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India
(Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: assigned to them in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Act, 2013, or any statutory
modification or re-enactment thereto or other regulations issued by the Reserve
<image>
Bank or the Glossary of Terms published by the Reserve Bank or as used in
commercial parlance, as the case may be.
enriched_requirements.object: as have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or the Companies Ac

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall comply with the following instructions in respect of all loans
sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021:
(1) The exact due dates for repayment of a loan, frequency of repayment,
breakup between principal and interest, examples of dates of
classification as special mention account (SMA) / non-performing asset
(NPA), etc.
enriched_requirements.object: instructions in respect of all loans sanctioned on or after December 31, 2021: (1) The exact due dates for repayment of a lo

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: shall be clearly specified in the loan agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreement

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) The borrower shall be apprised of the same at the time of loan sanction
and also at the time of subsequent changes, if any, to the sanction terms
/ loan agreement till full repayment of the loan.
enriched_requirements.object: same at the time of loan sanction and also at the time of subsequent changes

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In cases of loan facilities with moratorium on payment of principal and /
or interest, the exact date of commencement of repayment shall also be
specified in the loan agreements.
enriched_requirements.object: the loan agreements

conditions: In case of loans sanctioned before December 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of loans sanctioned before December 31, 2021, compliance to the
instructions in paragraph 15 shall be ensured as and when such loans become
due for renewal / review.
enriched_requirements.object: when such loans become due for renewal / review

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall implement the following instructions to increasing awareness
among the borrowers:
(1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining with
examples, the concepts of date of overdue, SMA and NPA classification
and upgradation, with specific reference to day-end process;
enriched_requirements.object: to increasing awareness among the borrowers: (1) place consumer education literature on its websites, explaining

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) consider displaying such consumer education literature in its branches
by means of posters and / or other appropriate media;
enriched_requirements.object: or other appropriate media

conditions:
if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall flag a borrower account as overdue, if so, as part of their day-end
processes for the due date, irrespective of the time of running such processes.
enriched_requirements.object: as overdue

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, classification of borrower accounts as SMA as well as NPA shall be
done as part of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA
classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end process is
run.
enriched_requirements.object: of day-end process for the relevant date and the SMA or NPA classification date shall be the calendar date for which the day end proce

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Thus, the date of SMA / NPA shall reflect the asset classification status of
an account at the day-end of that calendar date.
enriched_requirements.object: status of an account at the day-end of that calendar date

conditions: If due date of a loan account is March 31
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Illustration I:
If due date of a loan account is March 31, 2021, and full dues are
not received before the NBFC runs the day-end process for this date, the date of
overdue shall be March 31, 2021.

conditions: If it continues to remain overdue
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If it continues to remain overdue, then this
account shall get tagged as SMA-1 upon running day-end process on April 30,
2021 i.e.
enriched_requirements.object: upon running day-end process on April 30, 2021 i

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accordingly,
the date of SMA-1 classification for that account shall be April 30, 2021.

conditions: if the account continues to remain overdue

if continues to remain
overdue further
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Similarly, if the account continues to remain overdue, it shall get tagged as SMA-
2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain
overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon running day-end process on
June 29, 2021.
enriched_requirements.object: 2 upon running day-end process on May 30, 2021 and if continues to remain overdue further, it shall get classified as NPA upon runn

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The instructions in paragraphs 21 to 27 shall not apply to the microfinance loan
portfolio of a NBFC-MFI.
enriched_requirements.object: loan portfolio of a NBFC-MFI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall, after taking into account the degree of well-defined credit
weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation,
classify its lease / hire purchase assets, loans and advances and any other forms
of credit into the following classes: (i) Standard assets;
enriched_requirements.object: account the degree of well-defined credit weaknesses and extent of dependence on collateral security for realisation, classify its

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The above asset classification shall
also follow the requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025
for cases of resolution of stressed loans and advances.
enriched_requirements.object: contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 202

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The class of assets referred to in paragraph 21 shall not be upgraded merely as
a result of rescheduling, unless it satisfies the conditions required for the
upgradation as laid out in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: a result of rescheduling

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Asset classification shall be borrower-wise and not facility-wise.
enriched_requirements.object: facility-wise

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All the facilities
granted by an NBFC to a borrower and investment in all the securities issued by
the borrower shall have to be treated as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI)
and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become
irregular.
enriched_requirements.object: as NPA / Non-Performing Investment (NPI) and not the particular facility / investment or part thereof which has become irregular

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Loan accounts classified as NPAs may be upgraded as 'standard' asset only if
entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower.
enriched_requirements.object: asset only if entire arrears of interest and principal are paid by the borrower

conditions: In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case of borrowers having more than one credit facility, loan accounts shall be
upgraded from NPA to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire
arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilities.
enriched_requirements.object: to standard asset category only upon repayment of entire arrears of interest and principal pertaining to all the credit facilitie

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
With regard to upgradation of accounts classified as NPA due to restructuring,
non-achievement of date of commence of commercial operations (DCCO), etc.,
the instructions contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 shall be applicable
in addition to compliance with these directions.
enriched_requirements.object: to compliance with these directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The asset classification and provisioning requirements in respect of transactions
involving transfer of loans shall be as per the Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk)
Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank of India (Non- Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit Risk) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If a resolution plan is implemented in adherence to the provisions of Chapter
VI-A of Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution
of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, borrower
accounts which are classified as 'Standard' may be retained as such upon
implementation.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Borrower accounts which may have slipped into NPA between
the date of occurrence of the calamity and implementation of the resolution plan,
shall be upgraded as 'Standard', upon implementation of the resolution plan.
enriched_requirements.object: upon implementation of the resolution plan

conditions: Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that after implementation of the resolution plan, the subsequent asset
classification shall be governed by the criteria laid out in these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: criteria laid out in these Directions

conditions:
where a subsequent
restructuring is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter VI-A of the
aforesaid Directions
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Accounts which are restructured under paragraph 122E to 122L of the Reserve
Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed
Assets) Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, where a subsequent
restructuring is necessitated under the provisions of Chapter VI-A of the
aforesaid Directions, shall continue to be classified as 'Standard'.]
enriched_requirements.object: as 'Standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provision towards standard assets need not be netted from gross advances
but shall be shown separately as 'Contingent Provisions against Standard
Assets' in the balance sheet.
enriched_requirements.object: 'Contingent Provisions against Standard Assets' in the balance sheet

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC (excluding microfinance loan portfolio of a NBFC-MFI) shall, after
taking into account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing,
its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the erosion over time
in the value of security charged, make provision against sub-standard assets,
doubtful assets and loss assets.
enriched_requirements.object: account the time lag between an account becoming non-performing, its recognition as such, the realisation of the security and the

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Project Finance
(1) For project finance exposures, an NBFC shall maintain a general
provision at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio
basis:
Operational Phase - after commencement of
Construction
repayment of interest and principal (in per
Phase (in per cent)
cent) CRE 1.25 1.00 CRE-RH 1.00 0.75 All others 1.00 0.40
(2) For accounts which have availed DCCO deferment and are classified as
'standard', an NBFC shall maintain additional specific provisions as per
the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Company -
Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: at the following rates for the funded outstanding on a portfolio basis: Operational Phase - after commencement of Constru

conditions:
where financial closure has been achieved as
on October 1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) The provisions stipulated in sub-paragraphs (1) and (2) above shall not
be applicable for projects where financial closure has been achieved as
on October 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided
<image>
by the prudential guidelines prevailing before October 1, 2025 for the
purpose of provisioning, which otherwise shall be treated as repealed.
enriched_requirements.object: where financial closure has been achieved as on October 1, 2025, and such project loans shall continue to be guided <image>

conditions: if these were sanctioned post October 1
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(4) Notwithstanding sub-paragraph (3), in case of any resolution of a fresh
credit event and / or change in material terms and conditions in the loan
contract in such projects, subsequent to October 1, 2025, the provisions
stipulated in sub-paragraphs (1) and (2) above shall apply to these
projects as if these were sanctioned post October 1, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: as if these were sanctioned post October 1, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provisioning norms for liquidity facility provided for securitisation transactions -
The amount of liquidity facility drawn and outstanding for more than 90 days, in
respect of securitisation transactions undertaken in terms of the Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Securitisation Transactions)
Directions, 2025, shall be fully provided for.

The provisioning requirement for NPAs (excluding microfinance loan portfolio of
NBFC-MFI) in respect of loans, advances and other credit facilities including bills
purchased and discounted as well as project loans shall be as under:
(1) Sub-standard assets - A general provision of ten per cent of total
outstanding shall be made.
enriched_requirements.object: Sub-standard assets - A general provision of ten per cent of total outstanding shall be made

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) 100 per cent provision to the extent to which the advance is not
covered by the realisable value of the security to which the NBFC-
BL has a valid recourse shall be made.

estimated realisable value
of the outstanding) shall be made on the following basis:
Period for which the asset has been considered as doubtful
Provision (in per cent)
Up to one year 20 One to three years 30 More than three years 50
<image>
(3) Loss Assets - The entire asset shall be written off.
enriched_requirements.object: following basis: Period for which the asset has been considered as doubtful Provision (in per cent) Up to one year 20 One to three year

conditions:
If the assets are
permitted to remain in the books for any reason
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the assets are
permitted to remain in the books for any reason, 100 per cent of the
outstanding shall be provided for.

The provisioning requirements in respect of hire purchase and leased assets
shall be as under:
(1) In respect of hire purchase assets, the total dues (overdue and future
instalments taken together) as reduced by the following components
shall be provided for.
enriched_requirements.object: In respect of hire purchase assets, the total dues (overdue and future instalments taken together) as reduced by the following compon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(2) For the purpose of sub-paragraph (1), the depreciated value of the asset
shall be notionally computed as the original cost of the asset to be
reduced by depreciation at the rate of 20 percent per annum on a
straight-line method.
enriched_requirements.object: the original cost of the asset to be reduced by depreciation at the rate of 20 percent per annum on a straight-line method

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Also, in the case of second-hand asset, the original
cost shall be the actual cost incurred for acquisition of such second-hand
asset.
enriched_requirements.object: incurred for acquisition of such second-hand asset

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(3) In respect of hire purchase and leased assets, additional provision shall
be made as under:
Nil
enriched_requirements.object: Nil

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Where hire charges or lease rentals are overdue for more than 12 months up to 24 months
40 per cent of the net book value (iv) Where hire charges or lease rentals are overdue
for more than 24 months but up to 36 months
70 per cent of the net book value (v) Where hire charges or lease rentals are overdue for more than 48 months
for more than 36 months but up to 48 months
100 per cent of the net book value
(4) On expiry of a period of 12 months after the due date of the last
instalment of hire purchase / leased asset, the entire net book value shall
be fully provided for.

<image>
(5) The amount of caution money / margin money or security deposits kept
by the borrower with the NBFC in pursuance of the hire purchase
agreement may be deducted against the provisions stipulated in sub-
paragraph (1) above, if not already taken into account while arriving at
the equated monthly instalments under the agreement.
enriched_requirements.object: provisions stipulated in sub- paragraph (1) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(6) The value of any other security available in pursuance to the hire
purchase agreement shall be deducted only against the provisions
stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(7) The amount of security deposits kept by the borrower with the NBFC in
pursuance to the lease agreement together with the value of any other
security available in pursuance to the lease agreement shall be deducted
only against the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above.
enriched_requirements.object: the provisions stipulated under sub-paragraph (3) above

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The fact
that income on an NPA has not been recognised shall not be taken as
reason for not making provision.
enriched_requirements.object: for not making provision

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(9) All financial leases written on or after April 1, 2001 shall attract the
provisioning requirements as applicable to hire purchase assets.
enriched_requirements.object: as applicable to hire purchase assets

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC required to comply with Indian Accounting Standards (IndAS) shall
hold impairment allowances as required by Ind AS.
enriched_requirements.object: required by Ind AS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In parallel, the NBFC shall
also maintain the asset classification and compute provisions as per these
Directions including standard asset provisioning, borrower / beneficiary wise
classification, provisioning for standard as well as restructured assets, NPA
ageing, etc., which shall act as the prudential floor for provisioning requirements.
enriched_requirements.object: classification and compute provisions as per these Directions including standard asset provisioning, borrower / beneficiary wi

conditions: Where impairment allowance under Ind AS 109 is lower than the prudential floor
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Where impairment allowance under Ind AS 109 is lower than the prudential floor,
the NBFC shall appropriate the difference from their net profit or loss after tax to
a separate 'Impairment Reserve'.
enriched_requirements.object: their net profit or loss after tax to a separate 'Impairment Reserve'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The balance in the 'Impairment Reserve' shall
not be reckoned for regulatory capital.
enriched_requirements.object: capital

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Further, no withdrawals shall be permitted
<image>
from this reserve without prior permission from the Department of Supervision,
Reserve Bank of India.
enriched_requirements.object: this reserve without prior permission from the Department of Supervision, Reserve Bank of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The appropriation specified in paragraph 35 shall be considered for the
computation of the prudential floor, but shall not be reckoned for calculating net
NPAs.
enriched_requirements.object: net NPAs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For loan portfolios covered by Default Loss Guarantee (DLG) arrangements in
terms of Chapter III of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Credit Facilities) Directions, 2025 and Part B of the Reserve Bank
of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Transfer and Distribution of Credit
Risk) Directions, 2025 both dated November 28, 2025, an NBFC may consider the
DLG for determining provisions under the Expected Credit Loss framework across
all stages, subject to the requirements as laid down under Indian Accounting
Standards, which inter alia require the DLG arrangement to be integral to the
contractual terms of the loan and the DLG not being recognised separately.
enriched_requirements.object: determining provisions under the Expected Credit Loss framework across all stages

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall comply with the disclosure requirements as prescribed under
IndAS 1.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements as prescribed under IndAS 1

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Since upon every event of invocation of DLG, the DLG cover reduces to the extent
of invocation, an NBFC shall recompute their ECL provisioning requirements
across stages, after duly adjusting for the reduced DLG cover.]
4[C2.
enriched_requirements.object: requirements across stages, after duly adjusting for the reduced DLG cover

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
A NBFC shall make an additional specific provision of five percent of the
outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been
implemented in terms of Chapter VI-A of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: provision of five percent of the outstanding debt in respect of borrowers, for whom a resolution plan has been implemented

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
<image>
additional specific provisions shall be over and above the applicable prudential
provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For accounts where repeated restructuring is necessitated in terms of Chapter VI-
A of the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution
of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025, a NBFC shall make additional specific
provisioning of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of
restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: of five per cent of the outstanding debt for each instance of restructuring made under the aforesaid Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This additional specific
provisioning shall be over and above the applicable prudential provisions subject
to a ceiling of hundred per cent.
enriched_requirements.object: the applicable prudential provisions subject to a ceiling of hundred per cent

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The additional specific provisions maintained in terms of paragraph 36D and 36E
above may be written back upon the borrower paying at least 20% of the
outstanding debt with the NBFC, without slipping into NPA post implementation of
the restructuring, and without being subjected to another restructuring.]
enriched_requirements.object: the borrower paying at least 20% of the outstanding debt with the NBFC, without slipping into NPA post implementation of the rest

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The income recognition shall be based on recognised accounting principles.
enriched_requirements.object: accounting principles

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Income including interest / discount / hire charges / lease rentals or any other
charges on NPA shall be recognised only when it is actually realised.
enriched_requirements.object: it is actually realised

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any such
income recognised before the asset became non-performing and remaining
unrealised shall be reversed.

conditions: where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In cases of loans where moratorium has been granted for repayment of interest,
income may be recognised on accrual basis for accounts which continue to be
classified as 'standard'.
enriched_requirements.object: basis for accounts which continue to be classified as 'standard'

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
This shall be evaluated against the definition of
'restructuring' provided in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: definition of 'restructuring' provided in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Ass

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Interest income recognition in respect of borrower accounts where resolution
plan has been implemented in terms of Chapter VI-A of the Reserve Bank of
India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Resolution of Stressed Assets)
Directions, 2025 dated November 28, 2025, shall be on accrual basis.

For accounts specified at paragraph 36E of these Directions, interest income
shall be recognized on cash basis.]
enriched_requirements.object: basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An NBFC shall make suitable disclosures in their Notes to Accounts as per the
requirements contained in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial

Category of Assets Rate of Provision Individual housing loans and loans to Small and Micro Enterprises (SMEs)

transactions shall also attract provisioning requirement as applicable to the loan

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation
of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time
being in force.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the Reserve Bank may, if it considers necessary, issue
necessary clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the
interpretation of any provision of these Directions given by the Reserve Bank
shall be final and binding.
